title: QFINHUB Weekly Linkable Asset Plan — Phase 15.1
strategy: Create one high-quality linkable asset per week that finance blogs, resource pages, and nonprofits will naturally want to link to or embed.

assets.name: Mortgage Affordability Embed Widget (IMPROVE)
assets.target_audience: Real estate blogs, mortgage sites, homebuyer education orgs
assets.target_prospects: 100 real estate/mortgage blogs (new prospect research needed)
assets.why_link: Free interactive calculator that keeps visitors on their site. No redirect, no ads, fast embed.
assets.estimated_authority_value: HIGH — embeddable widgets are the strongest backlink asset type
assets.build_effort: NONE — already built. Focus entirely on outreach.
assets.pitch_template: I noticed your article on [specific topic]. Our free mortgage affordability calculator embeds directly on your page — your visitors get an instant result without leaving your site. Would you be interested in trying it?

assets.name: Compound Interest Calculator Embed Widget
assets.target_audience: FIRE blogs, investing sites, financial literacy educators
assets.why_link: Compound interest is universally relevant. Every personal finance blog covers it. An embeddable calculator adds interactive value.
assets.estimated_authority_value: HIGH — second widget doubles embeddable asset portfolio
assets.build_effort: MEDIUM — replicate mortgage widget pattern with compound interest calc
assets.auditor_risk: LOW — proven widget pattern, different calculator

assets.name: "Free Financial Tools for Homebuyers" Resource Page
assets.target_audience: Homebuyer education orgs, real estate agents, housing counselors
assets.target_prospects: 50 HUD-approved housing counseling agencies + homebuyer education sites
assets.why_link: Curated resource pages get linked by nonprofits and government sites as 'helpful resources.' Authoritative, non-commercial.
assets.estimated_authority_value: HIGH — .gov/.org backlinks are the strongest trust signals
assets.build_effort: LOW — single static page curating existing calculators

assets.name: Debt Payoff Strategy Comparison + Calculator Resource
assets.target_audience: Debt counseling nonprofits, credit unions, financial literacy orgs
assets.target_prospects: 50 debt counseling + credit union + financial literacy sites
assets.why_link: Debt nonprofits need free tools for their clients. A comparison page with interactive calculators is directly useful.
assets.estimated_authority_value: HIGH — nonprofit links carry strong trust
assets.build_effort: MEDIUM — new page + potential interactive comparison tool

estimated_authority_impact: 4 linkable assets × 25 outreach emails each = 100 touchpoints. At 5% reply rate and 20% link conversion = ~1-2 backlinks from this pipeline. Combined with existing outreach, targets 5-10 backlinks by end of Month 2.
